puzzleDescription: The grading system is corrupted! You must calculate the average of the student's grades, but you must IGNORE any failing marks (below 75). If you include failing marks, the average will be skewed!
objective: Given the array 'grades', iterate through it. Sum up only the grades that are 75 or higher. Then, divide that sum by the NUMBER of passing grades found to get the average. Print the final average.
hints: Don't just divide by grades.length; you need a separate 'passingCount' variable to track how many grades passed the filter.
